meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template to Solve No Ideas
content.seo_description: Overcome the blank page syndrome with this Antigravity project template. A beginner-friendly guide using Claude Code to ship high-quality client apps fast.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at empty IDEs. The Antigravity project template provides a pre-configured architecture that scaffolds production-ready SaaS foundations instantly. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate, integrate essential APIs, and deploy functional MVPs in hours, not weeks, allowing you to focus on high-value client features.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s silent killer. You have the technical skill, but the inertia of starting from scratch—configuring auth, database schemas, and folder structures—drains your billable hours before you write a single line of business logic. It’s a recurring nightmare of infinite setup loops.

We are ending that cycle today. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you transform your workflow from 'manual architect' to 'rapid executor.' This approach isn't just about speed; it's about establishing a repeatable, elite-tier delivery system that makes your clients think you have a team of ten working behind the scenes.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational project structure using the template to ensure consistent directory architecture across all client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready SaaS boilerplate using the Antigravity template, including standard auth, database ORM, and environment configuration files.

steps.title: Configure Domain Logic
steps.description: Inject your specific client requirements into the pre-built schema to avoid manual database migration headaches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the database schema to support a user-subscription model with roles: admin, editor, and viewer. Generate the corresponding Prisma migration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review schema.prisma and apply the new role-based access control models'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Use the template's built-in API factories to create CRUD endpoints without writing repetitive boilerplate code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate RESTful endpoints for a 'Project' entity, including GET, POST, and DELETE methods with Zod validation integrated.

steps.title: Integrate UI Components
steps.description: Map the backend logic to the template's UI library to ensure a professional, cohesive look and feel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard view that fetches the 'Project' data and renders it in a responsive table component using Tailwind CSS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a dashboard component using the project-list-table template'

steps.title: Finalize and Deploy
steps.description: Run the automated test suite and push the project to your chosen production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and optimize the build configuration for deployment to Vercel.

pro_tips: Always create a custom 'config.json' in your template root to store client-specific API keys, keeping your code environment-agnostic.
Use Claude Code's 'memory' flag to ensure the AI remembers your naming conventions across multiple files, preventing style drift.
Run 'antigravity audit' every Friday to catch deprecated dependencies before they become technical debt for your clients.
Build a library of custom 'sub-templates' for recurring features like Stripe checkout flows or OAuth providers to save 5+ hours per project.
Leverage the 'diff' mode in Claude Code to review every injected boilerplate change, ensuring you maintain full control over the codebase.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, extract your most-used UI components into a private npm package to create a personal component library that speeds up future builds even further.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance business with a system that works as hard as you do. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
